LanguageData.ARA_Chrony.description: Clooney is a small Arachne warrior-type parasite, although she is petite, her aggression is extreme. She will launch stronger attacks on a larger scale during her cycle. Additionally, she will send fewer visitors and passing nomads; she won't deploy blackcloaks when the colony is about to fall.
LanguageData.ARA_Chrony.label: "Warrior Race" Clooney
